title: Bare Bones - Flux Enhanced Addon
description: Making Bare Bones more player-friendly (e.g. leafier leaves).
body:
Enhance your [Bare Bones](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones) experience!

This is an addon for the [Bare Bones resource pack by RobotPants](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones) and only changes some selected textures. _This is not a complete resource pack!_

If you prefer semi-transparent leaves over Bare Bones' original single-colored leave textures, this addon is for you. It makes leaves semi-transparent and more suitable for survival play and building.

How to use:
- Place this pack in your resource packs folder (do not unzip)
- Activate the Flux Enhanced addon together with the original Bare Bones pack in the game's resource pack settings
- The addon must be placed above the original pack
